findings.finding: Section 1 routing prose enumerates three dispositions but none covers PATH-reachable wrapper that fails at use-time; only compensating surface is repr(exc) on stderr.
findings.evidence_quote: exit 0 binary reachable all three options

findings.finding: --base-branch main hardcoded; in repos whose default is master or trunk command -v exits 0 but cortex-worktree-create fails.
Rule 2 behavior in narrative prose is not specified; no negative fixture for in-prose Rule 2.
findings.evidence_quote: Inside any python-source region run the regex

findings.finding: Heredoc regex anchored at line start; heredocs prefixed by command-substitution, wrapper invocations, or env-var preamble will not match.
findings.evidence_quote: Heredoc extraction regex captures the heredoc opener and marker

findings.finding: Task 4 bin shim probe path depends on Task 3 wheel being reinstalled; plan does not enforce reinstall between Tasks 3 and 4.
Self-circular pre-commit firing risk; Task 4 commit triggers Phase 1.86 against itself.
findings.evidence_quote: Phase 1.86 will trigger because bin cortex-check-bare-python-import IS in the trigger pattern

findings.finding: Cross-task parallelism between Task 1 and Task 2 unhandled.
findings.evidence_quote: module reads implement.md text once at module scope

findings.finding: Plan does not handle uv tool install --reinstall failing mid-task.
findings.evidence_quote: Wheel-reinstall ordering Task 1 adds the project.scripts entry

findings.finding: Authorial contract for stacked sentinels is unspecified; no doc edit in plan file list.
findings.evidence_quote: the sentinel provides a documented escape hatch for intentional documentation quotes

findings.finding: prev_nonblank blank-line accommodation widens sentinel reach; closing-fence-delimiter behavior conflated between prev_nonblank and fence_preceding mechanisms.
